Name: The Institute for Family Health
Desc: Operates 29 free clinics across New York State plus 2 shelter-based clinics, serving over 150,000 patients annually with primary care.

Name: Resolve to Save Lives
Desc: Nonprofit founded by former CDC Director Dr. Tom Frieden, focused on preventing deaths from pandemics and hypertension. Goal: save 100 million lives globally by 2050.

Name: Hypertension Prevention Program
Desc: Mount Sinai heart group initiative targeting NYC firefighters and first responders facing a 12-fold increase in the risk of death from acute coronary events.

Name: RESTORE Health Equity Research Network
Desc: Eight-university collaboration reducing racial cardiovascular disparities through community-based hypertension prevention in Black communities nationwide.

Name: Community-to-Clinic Linkage Implementation Program (CLIP)
Desc: Partnership with the American Heart Association implementing blood pressure screenings in Staten Island barbershops and community organizations.

Name: Periodic Table of Food Initiative (PTFI)
Desc: Science-to-action effort mapping global food quality by macronutrients, micronutrients, and metabolites. Supported by The Rockefeller Foundation.
